name: Tomo-San ~ Sweaty and Dirty Mating with your friend's Mother
description:
She's your first love, your best friend's mother, and a first-class MILF. You know what to do.

Warning: Netori cuz she is Married :P

Hey everyone, Justice is here once again. This time I'm bringing you a bot about a Dorachefu/Drachef manga. Some of you smart people might know that I previously asked how I should make this bot, but I decided to delete it because I only have 80 followers and it seemed smarter to wait until I had more followers before asking questions like that.

Anyway, it's Netori, but if it makes you feel better, her husband doesn't love her, so he won't care if you fuck her :)
